title: Immediate pre-work — this week's deliverables
subtitle: From today's meeting — must be sent to management before any Odoo work begins

tasks.label: Email: list of mandatory + optional employee master data fields
tasks.deliverable: Mandatory: Employee Name, Biometric Code, Father Name, Work Mobile, Work Email, CNIC, Payroll Status, Gender, Joining Date, Date of Birth, Department, Designation, Employment Nature. Optional: Department Code, Contact No., Religion, Domicile/Province, Current Position, Tax Payer Status, Visiting Campuses, Report To.

tasks.label: Email: list of documents to be uploaded per employee
tasks.deliverable: Mandatory: Attested Educational Docs, CNIC, Council Registration Card/Certificate, Photograph, HEC Equivalence Certificate, Resume, Appointment Letter. Optional: Domicile, Experience Certificate, Thesis Title & Abstract, Job Offer, Joining Report, Undertaking.

tasks.label: Email: version 1.2 policy questions — leave, attendance, salary, probation, notice period
tasks.deliverable: Policy observations: Faculty attendance rules (Section 5.3) — revision needed. Salary Bands (Section 7.3) — to be defined. Employment Contracts (Section 8.1) — revision needed.

tasks.label: Confirm Odoo as the single system (not Udyog)
tasks.deliverable: Confirmed — Odoo is the single HR system.

tasks.label: Designate Odoo administrator from HR team
tasks.deliverable: Designated: Ms. Nasra Naqvi (Director HR) as Odoo administrator.

authorities: Registrar — coordinate & accelerate all pending policy approvals
Vice Chancellor — centralized decisions on key HR parameters
BOG — formal policy approvals if required
note: Key insight from meeting: The system does not think automatically — every rule in Odoo must first be decided on paper.

title: Policy foundation — the bedrock of everything
subtitle: Nothing in Odoo can be correctly configured without these approvals

tasks.label: Employee categories policy (permanent, contract, visiting faculty; admin; support)
Working hours policy — faculty flexible vs admin fixed
Leave policy — casual, sick, earned, LWP entitlements per category
Probation period — 3 or 6 months, faculty vs admin separately
Notice period — resignation & termination, faculty vs admin
Salary & compensation policy — monthly salary + per-lecture for visiting
Attendance deduction rules — grace time, half-day trigger, late deduction formula
HEC-aligned faculty recruitment policy
HR Policy Manual v1.0 (consolidating all approved policies)
Organogram (approved hierarchy: Lecturer → HoD → Dean → VC/Rector)
Employment contract templates — 4 versions: permanent, contract, visiting, admin

odooSteps: None — Odoo configuration cannot begin without approved policies
authorities: Board of Governors — all foundational policies
Vice Chancellor — organogram and category definitions
note: Faculty and admin must never share the same leave, attendance, or salary structures in Odoo.

title: Organizational structure & employee master data
subtitle: The core foundation of Odoo — every other module depends on this

tasks.label: Employee data collection form (mandatory vs optional fields separated)
Document upload checklist — CNIC, degrees, experience letters, appointment letter, contract, photo
Data collection drive plan (who collects from whom, by when)

odooSteps: Create Schools as departments (Engineering, Nursing, Management, etc.)
Create sub-departments within each School
Set up job positions with correct hierarchy
Create employee profiles — mandatory fields only
Upload signed contracts and required documents
Set reporting lines (Lecturer → HoD → Dean → VC)
authorities: Director HR — validates all employee profiles
HoDs — verify faculty data in their departments
note: No employee should exist in Odoo without a complete profile. If it is not in Odoo, it does not exist officially.

title: Attendance configuration & biometric integration
subtitle: Upgrade existing biometric infrastructure to full Odoo integration

tasks.label: Attendance parameters summary sheet
Biometric machine integration record
Missing punch and exceptions register

odooSteps: Create 3 work schedules: admin strict (9–5), faculty flexible, visiting lecture-based
Set late arrival grace time per schedule
Configure half-day deduction triggers
Sync biometric machines with Odoo Attendance
Assign each employee to correct work schedule
Set up daily HR monitoring view
authorities: Director HR — approves attendance rules before configuration
IT team — biometric sync technical implementation
note: Faculty attendance must never be treated identically to admin attendance. Three distinct schedules are non-negotiable.

title: Leave management
subtitle: Replaces all verbal leave approvals with system-driven workflows

tasks.label: Opening leave balance register (migration of existing balances)
Leave allocation schedule (annual entitlements by category)

odooSteps: Create leave types: Casual, Sick, Earned, LWP, Study Leave (faculty)
Set annual entitlements by employee category
Configure carry-forward rules
Set approval workflow: Employee → HoD → HR (3-tier)
Allocate opening leave balances
Mark visiting faculty as ineligible for paid leave
prerequisites: Leave types and entitlements per category (approved)
authorities: Director HR — configures and activates the module
HoDs — first approvers in the workflow
note: From go-live, any leave not applied in Odoo will be treated as absent.

title: Payroll implementation
subtitle: Most critical and complex phase — run parallel for 2 months before going live

tasks.label: Salary grade chart (approved by Finance + BOG)
Payroll input template for monthly variables
Loan register (existing advances to be migrated)
Tax calculation sheet (per employee where applicable)

odooSteps: Create 4 salary structures: permanent faculty, contract faculty, admin, visiting
Configure allowances (house, medical, transport)
Configure deductions (late, EOBI, loan installments)
Link attendance and leave to payroll engine
Assign each employee to correct salary structure
Run 2 months parallel payroll (Odoo vs manual)
Generate and archive first official payslips
authorities: BOG — salary bands and grade chart
Finance Department — payroll go-live sign-off
Director HR — monthly payroll closure
note: Parallel running is mandatory — processing live payroll without validation is the most common and costly Odoo implementation mistake.

title: Contracts, probation & confirmations
subtitle: Critical for HEC compliance — illegal over-probation must be prevented

tasks.label: Appointment letter template (per category)
Contract templates v1.0 (4 versions)
Probation completion notice template
Confirmation/regularization letter template
Contract renewal letter template

odooSteps: Assign contract type to every employee
Set probation end dates with alerts
Configure 30-day pre-probation-end alert to Director HR
Set contract expiry alerts
Generate confirmation letters from Odoo
authorities: Registrar — probation completion and confirmation
Director HR — contract renewals
note: HEC audits frequently check whether employees were held in probation beyond the policy limit.

title: Recruitment workflow (end-to-end in Odoo)
subtitle: Eliminates Excel-based recruitment — all stages recorded in system

tasks.label: Job advertisement template (faculty and admin versions)
Application form (online via Odoo portal)
Shortlisting criteria matrix per job category
Interview score sheet (structured, per HEC criteria)
Offer/appointment letter template (auto-generated)

odooSteps: Create pipeline: Application → Shortlisted → Interview → Scored → Offer → Appointed
Configure interview scheduling
Set up interview score entry forms
Link appointed candidate to employee profile
Generate appointment letter automatically
authorities: Selection Committee + Rector — faculty appointments
Registrar — admin staff appointments
note: Every recruitment decision must be recorded in Odoo. HEC compliance audits require documented evidence of merit-based hiring.

title: Performance management (Academic HR priority)
subtitle: Faculty evaluation — teaching, research, institutional service

tasks.label: Faculty performance evaluation policy — 3 pillars
Staff KPI framework for admin roles
Annual appraisal calendar (academic year cycle)
Promotion and increment criteria linked to performance
Faculty self-assessment form (annual)
HoD / supervisor evaluation form
Student feedback aggregation form
Performance review meeting record template
Research and publication log per faculty member

odooSteps: Create appraisal templates (faculty and admin separately)
Set up annual appraisal cycle with notifications
Configure workflow: self-assessment → supervisor → HR → meeting
Upload research publications and feedback scores
authorities: Academic Council — faculty evaluation policy
Director HR — staff appraisal process
Deans/HoDs — supervisor evaluations

title: Discipline & exit management
subtitle: HR's legal protection — all disciplinary and separation actions fully documented

tasks.label: Code of conduct (academic and corporate)
Disciplinary procedure — warning, show-cause, suspension, termination
Resignation and termination procedure per category
Clearance process (IT, Library, Finance, HR)
Final settlement computation rules
Warning letter template (first, second, final)
Show-cause notice template
Resignation acceptance letter template
No-objection / clearance form (multi-department)
Final settlement computation sheet
Experience / relieving letter template

odooSteps: Set up disciplinary record fields per employee
Configure exit workflow: resignation → clearance → settlement → relieved
Link clearance to Finance and IT (multi-department sign-off)
Generate experience letter automatically
Archive exited employee records (not deleted)
authorities: Registrar — resignation acceptance and final settlement
Director HR — clearance process management
note: Odoo's disciplinary and exit records are MUST's legal evidence.

title: HR dashboards & management reporting
subtitle: Real-time insights for Vice Chancellor, Registrar, and BOG

tasks.label: Monthly HR report template (generated from Odoo)
HR dashboard design spec (for Odoo admin)

odooSteps: Configure headcount dashboard — faculty vs admin, by department
Build faculty-to-student ratio tracker
Set up payroll cost by department report
Configure attendance compliance summary
Build recruitment pipeline dashboard
Configure retention and turnover analytics
Schedule automated monthly reports to VC and Registrar
authorities: Director HR — report design and distribution
Odoo/Reporting Lead — technical dashboard configuration
note: One monthly dashboard meeting with VC + Registrar using live Odoo data demonstrates HR has become a strategic function.
